description: Letter sent to Kẖawaja Shalom by a friend welcoming him upon his arrival – December 21 1925CE – Museum of Islamic Art – (number 199) – in Arabic. (information from Ḥassanein Muḥammad Rabīʿa, ed., Dalīl Wathā'iq al-Janīza al-Jadīda / Catalogue of the Documents of the New Geniza, 57). MCD.
